languages.text: "Данное утверждение ложно. Образец, безусловно, категоризируется как богохульный. Однако долг Эксплоратора велит отринуть завет "не ведаю зла, не зрю скверны". Пока образец не демонстрирует опасного поведения, он подлежит изучению".

traits.locale_text: "Данное утверждение ложно. Образец, безусловно, категоризируется как богохульный. Однако долг Эксплоратора велит отринуть завет "не ведаю зла, не зрю скверны". Пока образец не демонстрирует опасного поведения, он подлежит изучению".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "Diese Aussage ist falsch. Das Thema ist eindeutig als gotteslästerlich eingestuft, aber das Glaubensbekenntnis des Forschers verlangt, dass ich das Gebot "nichts Böses wissen, nichts Böses sehen" ablehne. Solange das Subjekt kein gefährliches Verhalten zeigt, muss es untersucht werden."
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "Cette affirmation est fausse. Le sujet est clairement classé comme blasphématoire, mais le credo de l'Explorateur exige que je rejette le commandement "ne pas connaître le mal, ne pas voir la corruption". À moins que le sujet ne présente un comportement dangereux, il doit être étudié."
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "这种说法是错误的。研究对象显然被归类为亵渎神灵，但探索者的信条要求我摒弃 "不知邪恶，不见堕落 "的戒律。除非研究对象表现出危险行为，否则就应该对其进行研究。"
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "Esta afirmación es falsa. El sujeto está claramente categorizado como blasfemo, pero el credo del Explorador exige que rechace el mandamiento "no conozcas el mal, no veas la corrupción". A menos que el sujeto muestre un comportamiento peligroso, debe ser estudiado".
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "この発言は誤りである。この対象は明らかに神を冒涜するものと分類されるが、探検家の信条は私に "悪を知らず、腐敗を見ず "という戒律を拒否することを求めている。対象が危険な行動を示さない限り、それは研究されるべきものである。"
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."

languages.text: "Bu ifade yanlıştır. Konu açıkça kafir olarak sınıflandırılmıştır, ancak Kaşif'in inancı "kötülük bilme, yolsuzluk görme" emrini reddetmemi gerektirir. Konu tehlikeli davranışlar sergilemediği sürece incelenmelidir."
languages.original_text: "This statement is false. The subject is clearly categorised as blasphemous, but the Explorator's creed demands I reject the commandment "know no evil, see no corruption". Unless the subject exhibits dangerous behaviour, it is to be studied."
